title: Internal error on string parameter in latest master
body:
The following code:
```
module test;
   parameter A = "";

   initial begin
      if(A == "TEST") begin
         $display("Test");
      end
   end
endmodule
```

leads to the following error on latest master:
```
%Error: Internal Error: test.sv:6:12: ../V3Number.cpp:2433: Number operation called with non-string argument: '64'h54455354"
                                    : ... In instance test
    6 |       if(A == "TEST") begin
      |            ^~
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
```

This is working properly on latest stable version (4.214).
